Carle Vernet

2 works in the gallery.
Click any image to enlarge. Use ← → or close with Esc.
Cuirassier on Foot Restraining His Rearing Horse
by Carle Vernet
France · 1817–1836 · Lithograph in black on cream wove paper
Saddled Arabian Horse in Courtyard
by Carle Vernet
France, 19th century · 1820 · pen and brown ink, brown wash, with gray wash, over black chalk or crayon, heightened with white gouache and white chalk
←After Claude-Joseph Vernet Claude Vernet→
